creator: insane@lunatic.oneinsane.net
text:
Whisker has been upfated to ver 1.4

Fix: PORTNAME=	whisker
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.4
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.wiretrip.net/rfp/bins/whisker/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}
      
 MAINTAINER=	kris@FreeBSD.ORG
        
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/v1.3
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/v1.4
         
 do-build:
          		(cd ${WRKSRC}; ${SED} "s%y0y0y0%${PREFIX}%g" whisker.pl
           		> whisker)

How-To-Repeat: 
	Take a look at http://www.wiretrip.net/rfp/p/doc.asp?id=21&iface=2
